title: Academic Research Paper
description: Schema for extracting metadata from academic publications and preprints.

title.description: The full title of the research paper

authors.description: List of authors who contributed to the paper

abstract.description: The abstract or summary of the paper

journal_or_conference.description: Name of the journal, conference, or publication venue

doi.description: Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the paper

citations_count.description: Number of times the paper has been cited

pdf_url.description: Direct link to download the PDF, if available
